SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-03-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Attorney Seth Wiener for Appellant/Defendant Fasty Fresh, Inc. DBA(Firepie Pizza)along with
company representative Rick Richman.

Respondent/Plaintiff Martin O'Dowd is present in pro per.

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo.
Martin O'Dowd testifies on behalf of himself.

Exhibits introduced:
Exhibit A - 3 page email dated 1/10/19 and 3/1/19.

Rick Richman testifies on behalf of Fire Pie.

Counsel for Appellant examines all parties.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, Clerk Sylvia Java, Not reported.(525)
